[Skip to content](https://northbrook.com.gh/about-us/#content_skip_link_anchor) [Skip to footer](https://northbrook.com.gh/about-us/#footer_skip_link_anchor)

[![North-Brook Limited](https://northbrook.com.gh/wp-content/uploads/2022/03/logo-invert-nb.png)](https://northbrook.com.gh/)Close

[facebook-1](https://business.facebook.com/ThemeRexStudio/) [twitter-new](https://twitter.com/ThemerexThemes) [dribble-new](https://dribbble.com/ThemeREX) [instagram](https://www.instagram.com/themerex_net/)

![about-us-top](https://i0.wp.com/northbrook.com.gh/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/about-us-top.png?fit=520%2C599&ssl=1)

Established in 2011, we bring more than 11 years of hands-on experience across air and sea freight, cargo consolidation, crew management, bunkering, warehousing, and full-service ship agency and husbandry. But beyond the technical capabilities, what sets us apart is our responsiveness, regional expertise, and a reputation for solving complex logistical challenges with precision and flexibility

Who We are

# North-Brook Limited

For over a decade, North-Brook Limited has powered some of the most demanding logistics operations across Ghana and the West African sub-region. Whether it’s about delivering vital offshore equipment to rigs off the coast of Takoradi, coordinating multi-modal cargo to remote inland locations, or managing ship agency services under tight maritime deadlines, you can trust North-Brook Limited’s strong track record.

![about-down](https://i0.wp.com/northbrook.com.gh/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/about-down.png?fit=630%2C482&ssl=1)

Our Services

# What We Excel At.

We don’t just move goods – we move entire operations forward.
From port clearance to crew welfare, fuel logistics to air-sea freight solutions, we operate with precision where others hesitate.

#### [Ship Agency &](https://northbrook.com.gh/our-services\#ship-agency-and-husbandry) [Husbandry Services](https://northbrook.com.gh/our-services\#ship-agency-and-husbandry)

[Read More](https://northbrook.com.gh/our-services#ship-agency-and-husbandry)

#### [Air & Sea](https://northbrook.com.gh/our-services\#air-and-sea-freight) [Freight Solutions](https://northbrook.com.gh/our-services\#air-and-sea-freight)

[Read More](https://northbrook.com.gh/our-services#air-and-sea-freight)

#### [Bunkering &](https://northbrook.com.gh/our-services\#bunkering-and-fuel-logistics) [Fuel Logistics](https://northbrook.com.gh/our-services\#bunkering-and-fuel-logistics)

[Read More](https://northbrook.com.gh/our-services#bunkering-and-fuel-logistics)

#### [Warehousing &](https://northbrook.com.gh/our-services\#warehousing-cargo-consolidation) [Cargo Consolidation](https://northbrook.com.gh/our-services\#warehousing-cargo-consolidation)

[Read More](https://northbrook.com.gh/our-services#warehousing-cargo-consolidation)

## We don’t just move cargo or manage crews, we deliver trust at every turn

Mr. Michael Blay, Chief Executive Officer

## How We Work

Customer-Centric Solutions

Tailor services to meet the unique needs of clients, ensuring personalized and responsive solutions

Innovation and Adaptability

Embracing cutting-edge technologies and innovation that adapt to evolving industry demands.

Operational Excellence

We strive for superior performance in all aspects of logistics, both on shore and Off shore.

Global Expertise & Local Insight

Leverage strategic alliances and local knowledge to deliver precision results for complex logistics challenges.

Safety and Compliance

Adhering to stringent safety regulations and industry standards to ensure effective operations.

![home02](https://i0.wp.com/northbrook.com.gh/wp-content/uploads/elementor/thumbs/home02-r91rmet28jcfhl43s4faa3mofjepjvuehpyjdx9oas.png?w=1200&ssl=1)

CSR

# CORPORATE SOCIAL RESPONSIBILITY

At North-Brook Limited, we believe true success is measured not only in business performance but also in the positive impact we leave on society and the environment. Our CSR efforts focus on practical, high-impact initiatives that support education, community well-being, environmental protection, and capacity building.

## Our Community Impact

Education & Skills Development

Donation of books, computers, and school supplies to coastal community schools.

Community Support

Sponsorship of local sports events that promote youth development and discipline.

Distribution of basic PPE (gloves, helmets, masks) to local contractors and artisans.

Environmental Protection

Tree planting projects to reduce carbon impact and restore green spaces.

Promotion of waste segregation and recycling practices within our warehouses and

partner facilities.

Local Employment & Capacity Building

Partnerships with vocational institutions to develop a pipeline of skilled technicians.

[Scroll to top](https://northbrook.com.gh/about-us/# "Scroll to top")

data.markdown:
[Skip to content](https://northbrook.com.gh/our-services/#content_skip_link_anchor) [Skip to footer](https://northbrook.com.gh/our-services/#footer_skip_link_anchor)

[![North-Brook Limited](https://northbrook.com.gh/wp-content/uploads/2022/03/logo-invert-nb.png)](https://northbrook.com.gh/)Close

[facebook-1](https://business.facebook.com/ThemeRexStudio/) [twitter-new](https://twitter.com/ThemerexThemes) [dribble-new](https://dribbble.com/ThemeREX) [instagram](https://www.instagram.com/themerex_net/)

![](https://i0.wp.com/northbrook.com.gh/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/coordinating-operations.jpg?fit=630%2C482&ssl=1)

# Ship Agency & Husbandry

We provide complete vessel husbandry services, from port clearance and documentation to coordination and onboard provisioning. Our team ensures vessels receive timely support, enabling efficient port calls and uninterrupted operations.

# Air & Sea Freight

Through our integrated global network and local expertise, we deliver cost-effective air and sea freight solutions. Whether urgent shipments or bulk cargo, we ensure timely, secure, and seamless transport across borders.

![](https://i0.wp.com/northbrook.com.gh/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/Freight.jpg?fit=630%2C482&ssl=1)

![](https://i0.wp.com/northbrook.com.gh/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/Fuel-Logistics.jpg?fit=630%2C482&ssl=1)

# Total logistics services

We offer reliable bunkering services with transparent supply chains, ensuring vessels and offshore assets always have the fuel they need. Our focus is on safety, quality, and efficiency, minimizing downtime and keeping you on course.

# Warehousing & Cargo Consolidation

Our warehousing facilities provide secure storage, inventory management, and cargo consolidation services. With optimized supply chain planning, we help reduce costs, improve efficiency, and keep your goods ready for distribution when and where you need them.

![](https://i0.wp.com/northbrook.com.gh/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/warehouse.jpg?fit=630%2C482&ssl=1)

![](https://i0.wp.com/northbrook.com.gh/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/WhatsApp-Image-2025-09-22-at-2.35.57-PM.jpeg?fit=1024%2C647&ssl=1)

# Import & Export Documentation

Tag: Oil & Gas, Mining


We manage the full scope of import and export paperwork — from permits and certificates of origin to dangerous goods declarations — ensuring every shipment is accurately documented and compliant with local and international regulations. This has included documentation for Fugro’s offshore geophysical surveys and Saipem’s multi-phase drilling campaigns operating in Ghanaian waters.

# Ship Agency & Husbandry

Tag: Oil & Gas, Mining


We act as the single point of contact for every vessel call — coordinating port clearance, documentation, crew logistics, and onboard provisioning to ensure efficient turnarounds and uninterrupted operations. Past vessel calls we have managed include the Safeen Argus 2, Luna Nelle, and the Ametrin Valor.

![](https://i0.wp.com/northbrook.com.gh/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/WhatsApp-Image-2024-09-10-at-10.29.53-2.jpg?fit=1024%2C768&ssl=1)

![](https://i0.wp.com/northbrook.com.gh/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/WhatsApp-Image-2025-09-22-at-2.36.58-PM.jpeg?fit=1080%2C810&ssl=1)

# Crew Management

Tag: Oil & Gas, Mining

We handle the full cycle of crew logistics — travel, accommodation, visa processing, and port formalities — so that every rotation is seamless and every regulation met. We have delivered crew management support for OSM Thome and across Saipem’s extended drilling operations in the region.

# Customs Clearance

Tags: Oil & Gas, Chemicals, Manufacturing

We navigate the full customs process on behalf of our clients — managing documentation, duties, inspections, and regulatory requirements to move cargo through borders quickly and compliantly. This has covered everything from drilling equipment for Eni and Borr Drilling, to chemical consignments and manufactured components requiring specialist classification.

![](https://i0.wp.com/northbrook.com.gh/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/ChatGPT-Image-Mar-14-2026-09_35_47-AM.png?fit=1536%2C1024&ssl=1)

![](https://i0.wp.com/northbrook.com.gh/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/bunker-ne-ise-yarar_029c9.jpg?fit=1920%2C1440&ssl=1)

# Bunkering

Tags: Oil & Gas, Mining

We source and deliver fuel to vessels and offshore assets with transparent supply chains, a firm focus on quality control, and the local network to minimise turnaround time. Our bunkering support has kept vessels on schedule across Borr Drilling’s campaigns and multiple survey operations in Ghanaian waters.

# Haulage Services

Tags: Oil & Gas, Automotive, Manufacturing, Chemicals

We move cargo from port to destination — whether heavy drilling equipment, bulk materials, automotive parts, or sensitive chemical consignments — with routes and handling tailored to the nature of each load. We have provided haulage across Saipem’s operational sites and for Fugro’s survey equipment throughout Ghana.

![](https://i0.wp.com/northbrook.com.gh/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/WhatsApp-Image-2025-09-22-at-4.59.20-PM.jpeg?fit=2560%2C1709&ssl=1)

![](https://i0.wp.com/northbrook.com.gh/wp-content/uploads/2020/05/Geotechnical6.jpeg?fit=1600%2C1200&ssl=1)

# Sea Freight Forwarding

Tags: Oil & Gas, Mining, Chemicals, Manufacturing

We coordinate the end-to-end movement of sea freight — consolidating cargo, managing documentation, and working with our global network to deliver on time and within budget regardless of the complexity. We have handled freight for Dolphin Geo Subsea’s subsea campaigns, Cypress Energy’s supply chain, and mining equipment consignments requiring specialist handling.

[Scroll to top](https://northbrook.com.gh/our-services/# "Scroll to top")

Copy of Company Recruitment Policies

![](https://media.canva.com/v2/image-resize/format:PNG/height:106/quality:100/uri:ifs%3A%2F%2FM%2Ff927fdd6-cad6-4efe-af52-5627fe74b291/watermark:F/width:150?csig=AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAMPMbIayoTuDs6euFqHxKhyf3n1Xxx4yyRZdwwChoRyT&exp=1778777375&osig=AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAEomwlicwC43gj12L-CPvIrG8-fT9k0h04BJ7bxk9Zt-&signer=media-rpc&x-canva-quality=micro_thumbnail)

QHSE Policy Statement

Document Number :NBRK-QHSE-PCY-QHSE-001

Version : 2.0

Quality, Health, Safety and Environment Policy Statement

NORTH-BROOK LIMITED is committed to operating responsibly and in all its activities, account is taken of the need to protect the health and safety of its employees and other involved persons, provide security and conserve the environment, whilst providing the customers and stakeholders with a competent, safe, environmentally sound and cost-effective service which meets and exceeds industry specifications for QHSE. management.

NORTH-BROOK LIMITED aims to eliminate work-related injuries and illnesses and achievehigh environmental protection standards by following a zero tolerance for environmentalpollution. NORTH-BROOK complies with the purpose and spirit of relevant legislation andconventions, aiming to protecthealth, safety, and the environment, and provide security for alland avoid property damage

In this regard, NORTH-BROOK LIMITED  will:

- 1. Will comply with mandatory rules, regulations, and take into account codes, guidelines and standards from maritime organisations in managing vessels.

- 2. Actively promote high standards of safety consciousness, discipline and individual accountability. It encourages employees' involvement in defining and monitoring measures taken to safeguard and improve health and safety at work.

- 3. Promote satisfaction of Customers and stakeholders wherever possible by meeting and exceeding their needs and expectations

- 4. Strive to efficiently and effectively prevent pollution, prevent occupational injury and ill health, optimise energy and resource consumption and minimise the environmental impacts from activities, services and products.

- 5. Regularly assess and continually improve EHS performance responsibly by implementing management systems, setting goals, and meeting objectives.

- 6. Appropriately train, inform, motivate and consult with employees to help them perform their activities in a safe and environmentally responsible manner.

- 7. Promote the adoption of similar principles by contractors and suppliers.


This policy will be regularly reviewed, updated as necessary, applied and communicated to all employees and persons working for or on behalf of NORTHBROOK, and made available to interested parties and the public.

![](https://media.canva.com/v2/image-resize/format:JPG/height:80/quality:75/uri:ifs%3A%2F%2FM%2F7c80553f-b885-4c77-8971-8edb6c973055/watermark:F/width:200?csig=AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHGw97AFCz4GDLeKpUoxY_E9XTM_axNynDrPIHSMRTa6&exp=1778777468&osig=AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAADZvFCdBtEphkLq4ib4cwu6EalxIhphAzhg9R6P5Axvm&signer=media-rpc&x-canva-quality=thumbnail)

Michael Blay

Chief Executive Officer
